cancelDrop(uint256).details: CEI pattern: drop is deactivated before any transfer.      Only the creator can call this. Remaining = unclaimed slots × amountPerClaim.

claim(uint256).details: CEI pattern: all state changes happen before the USDC transfer.

createDrop(string,uint256,uint256,uint25.details: Caller must have approved this contract for at least amountPerClaim * maxClaims.      USDC is pulled atomically in this call — no USDC is held on behalf of other drops.

params.amountPerClaim: USDC amount each claimer receives (6 decimals, e.g. 2000000 = $2)
params.expiresAt: Unix timestamp when unclaimed USDC can be refunded (0 = no expiry)
params.maxClaims: How many unique wallets can claim (max 10,000)
params.title: Human-readable name (max 200 bytes)

returns.dropId: The ID of the newly created drop

refundExpired(uint256).details: Can be called by ANYONE after expiry — creator always receives the refund.      CEI pattern: drop is deactivated before any transfer.

cancelDrop(uint256).notice: Creator cancels their drop and recovers all remaining USDC.

claim(uint256).notice: Claim USDC from an active drop. One claim per wallet per drop.

dropBalance(uint256).notice: Accounting balance for a drop: unclaimed slots × amountPerClaim.         This exactly matches what the contract owes to this drop's claimers.

getDrop(uint256).notice: Get all details for a drop.

hasClaimed(uint256,address).notice: Check whether a specific address has claimed from a drop.

isClaimable(uint256).notice: Check whether a drop is currently claimable.

refundExpired(uint256).notice: Refund remaining USDC after a drop has expired.

totalDrops().notice: Total number of drops ever created (including closed ones).
